name: Caramelized Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, melt the butter over low heat.
2. Add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are tender and golden, about 15 minutes on medium-low heat.
3. Stir in the brown sugar and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes or until the onions are caramelized to your liking.
4. Season with salt.
5. Serve over burgers, steaks, or as a side dish.
